# SplitLaunch

> A/B testing your AI agent can install and run.

SplitLaunch is package-first A/B testing for customer-owned websites and apps.
It provides the `@splitlaunch/ab` package, `splitlaunch` CLI, browser pixel,
external command API, conversion tracking, and experiment reporting.

## Key URLs

- Website: https://www.splitlaunch.dev
- Live agent skills: https://www.splitlaunch.dev/api/skills
- Install docs: https://www.splitlaunch.dev/docs/install
- API docs: https://www.splitlaunch.dev/docs/api
- Command endpoint: https://www.splitlaunch.dev/api/external/v1/commands

## Important Docs

- Agent command playbook: ./SKILLS.md
- Quickstart: ./QUICKSTART.md
- Projects and pixel IDs: ./skills/projects.md
- Experiments: ./skills/experiments.md
- Conversion tracking: ./skills/conversion-tracking.md
- Reports: ./skills/reports.md
- Runbooks: ./runbooks/README.md

## Install

```bash
npm install @splitlaunch/ab
npx splitlaunch init
```

## Command Envelope

```json
{
  "command": "experiments.create",
  "input": {}
}
```

Use `Authorization: Bearer sl_live_...` for server, terminal, CI, and agent-side
requests. Never put the private API key in browser code. Browser code only uses
the public `px_...` pixel ID.
